message:
Fix type checking issues in helpers and stub packages

- Fix helpers.py: Use proper AST types (ast.cmpop, ast.operator) instead of ast.AST
- Fix stub packages: Replace ... with NotImplementedError for better error messages
- Update expressions.py stub declarations to match helper types

Reduces mypy errors from 28 to 21 errors (7 errors fixed).
Remaining errors are in generator.py which agents are currently working on.

files.patch:
@@ -17,4 +17,4 @@ def __init__(self, data: list, shape: tuple) -> None:
 
     def reshape(self, shape: tuple) -> "Tensor":
         """Reshape tensor"""
-        ...
+        raise NotImplementedError("ai.Tensor.reshape not yet implemented")

@@ -24,8 +24,8 @@ class ExpressionVisitor:
     module_functions: dict[str, dict[str, dict]]
 
     # Methods from other mixins
-    def visit_compare_op(self, op: ast.AST) -> str: ...
-    def visit_bin_op(self, op: ast.AST) -> str: ...
+    def visit_compare_op(self, op: ast.cmpop) -> str: ...
+    def visit_bin_op(self, op: ast.operator) -> str: ...
 
     def visit_expr(self, node: ast.AST) -> tuple[str, bool]:
         """Visit an expression node and return (code, needs_try) tuple"""

@@ -13,8 +13,8 @@ class HttpClient:
 
     def get(self, url: str) -> dict:
         """HTTP GET request"""
-        ...
+        raise NotImplementedError("http.HttpClient.get not yet implemented")
 
     def post(self, url: str, data: dict) -> dict:
         """HTTP POST request"""
-        ...
+        raise NotImplementedError("http.HttpClient.post not yet implemented")
